overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked, neon-lit district of Night City. The player character moves from a busy street with futuristic traffic into narrow alleys and descending stairways, passing holographic vendors and dense urban architecture with heavy Japanese cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy cyberpunk street with vehicle traffic and neon signage

events.description: yellow futuristic car drives past from left to right
approaching pedestrian plaza area with concrete steps

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet asphalt street, observing neon-lit buildings and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow futuristic sedan driving past on the wet road
pedestrians standing on sidewalk near building entrance

entered.detail: rain-slicked black asphalt reflecting neon lights
dense network of electrical wires crisscrossing between buildings
multi-story building covered in bright neon signage with Japanese characters
vertical traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with the camera walking forward along wet asphalt. Overhead power lines crisscross between buildings covered in bright neon signage. A yellow futuristic car drives past on the left while pedestrians stand on the sidewalk, and the traffic light ahead shows red.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with seating and holographic food vendor

events.description: exits street and enters covered plaza area with concrete steps
approaching food vendor stall with holographic display

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza, passing seated NPCs and approaching a food vendor with a holographic display

notable_agents.action: NPC with red hair sitting on white bench next to trash bags
holographic food vendor standing behind illuminated food cart

entered.detail: wide concrete steps leading up to building entrance
red food cart with glowing cyan light and skewers on display
long white bench with graffiti on the backrest
massive screen displaying clown face advertisement with SMOOTHIE text

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a semi-covered pedestrian plaza with concrete steps and benches. A holographic food vendor tends a glowing cart on the right while an NPC sits on a white bench surrounded by trash bags. Large digital billboards display advertisements overhead as the camera moves through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with vending machines and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: entering narrow alleyway between tall buildings
turning right corner in the maze-like alley system

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow alleyways, passing vending machines and turning corners

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with white hat and dark coat walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tight corridor walls covered in graffiti and utility boxes
blue and yellow automated vending machines with illuminated displays
concrete wall with green and blue spray paint tags
metal electrical boxes mounted on the alley wall

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a narrow enclosed alleyway with graffiti-covered walls and bright vending machines lining the right side. The camera navigates through the tight corridor, passing a pedestrian with a white hat walking in the opposite direction, while overhead wires and neon signs illuminate the confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stairway descending between buildings to lower street level

events.description: beginning descent down narrow concrete stairs
view opens to overlook lower street level with neon lights

agents.ego_description: descending a narrow stairway between buildings, overlooking a lower level with pink neon lights

entered.detail: steep concrete stairs descending between close building walls
green metal safety railings along the stair edge
view down to lower street level with bright pink neon illumination
metal walkway and scaffolding connecting buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: The final segment descends a narrow concrete stairway flanked by graffiti-covered walls and metal railings. As the camera moves downward, the view opens to reveal a lower street level bathed in pink neon light, with overhead walkways and scaffolding creating a dense vertical urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, rain-slicked city street into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins by moving along wet asphalt under a canopy of crisscrossing power lines and bright signage, passing a yellow futuristic car and pedestrians waiting at a red light. As the camera advances, the street opens into a semi-covered pedestrian plaza where a holographic food vendor glows beside concrete benches and towering digital billboards. The scene then shifts into a narrow, graffiti-lined alleyway, navigating past bright vending machines and oncoming pedestrians within a confined corridor of overhead wires. Finally, the camera descends a concrete stairway flanked by metal railings, opening up to reveal a lower street level bathed in pink neon light beneath a dense network of walkways and scaffolding.
